title: LyondellBasell Industries NV (LYB) CEO Peter Vanacker on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: LyondellBasell Industries NV (NYSE:LYB ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 29, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants David Kinney - Head, IR Peter Vanacker - CEO & Executive Director Michael McMurray - EVP & CFO Kenneth Lane - EVP, Global Olefins & Polyolefins Torkel Rhenman - EVP, Global Intermediates, Derivatives & Refining James Guilfoyle - EVP, Advanced Polymer Solutions & Global Supply Chain Conference Call Participants Stephen Byrne - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Joshua Spector - UBS Vincent Andrews - Morgan Stanley Frank Mitsch - Fermium Research John Roberts - Crédit Suisse Kevin McCarthy - Vertical Research Partners Bhavesh Lodaya - BMO Capital Markets Christopher Parkinson - Mizuho Securities Hassan Ahmed - Alembic Global Advisors Michael Leithead - Barclays Bank Jeffrey Zekauskas - JPMorgan Chase & Co. David Begleiter - Deutsche Bank Arun Viswanathan - RBC Capital Markets Michael Sison - Wells Fargo Securities Prashant Juvekar - Citigroup Operator Hello, and welcome to the LyondellBasell Teleconference. At the request of LyondellBasell, this conference is being recorded for instant replay purposes.

title: LyondellBasell (LYB) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: LyondellBasell (LYB) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.43% and 3.01%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: The 6 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Retirement
text: These are the six best dividend stocks for retirement purposes. They have consistent and high yields and their dividends are well-covered by earnings.

title: 7 Large-Cap Stocks Trading at a Discount Right Now
text: One of the financial metrics I use to find large-cap stocks trading at a discount is their free cash flow yield.  Free cash flow (or FCF) is the remaining cash flow from operations after subtracting a company's capital expenditures.

title: Cash In With 2 High-Yield Dividend Stocks: Passive-Income Stocks To Fight Inflation
text: The Consumer Price Index (CPI) jumped 9.1% in June, and many investors are turning to high-yielding dividend stocks to battle portfolio losses. This article highlights two dividend-paying stocks with excellent fundamentals, amazing profitability, and strong dividend safety grades. The yield on each stock pick is over 5%.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks Trading at a Huge Discount Right Now
text: Strong dividend stocks trading at a discount can still be found even as investors shift to more moderate, defensive equities. The post 7 Dividend Stocks Trading at a Huge Discount Right Now appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 5 Laggards For The Week Ending July 15, 2022
text: Following a nearly 2% increase in the S&P 500 in the previous week, the major indexes tumbled lower in the week ending July 15, 2022. The release of the monthly inflation report showing inflation at a four-decade high and a disappointing earnings release from JPM on Thursday contributed to the sour trading mood.

title: LyondellBasell to Discuss Second Quarter Results on Friday, July 29, 2022
text: HOUSTON and LONDON , July 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- LyondellBasell (NYSE: LYB), a leader in the global chemistry industry, will announce its second-quarter 2022 financial results before the U.S. market opens on Friday, July 29, followed by a webcast and teleconference to discuss the results at 11:00 a.m. EDT. title: LyondellBasell (LYB) Inks First Two Renewable Energy PPA
text: LyondellBasell's (LYB) purchase agreements support its climate goal of obtaining a minimum of 50% electricity from renewable sources by 2030.

title: LyondellBasell At 5.4% Yield Is A Gift For Dividend Investors
text: LyondellBasell is a leading chemicals firm whose share price has materially fallen over the past month. It's making strong steps towards an increasingly renewable future and is returning cash to shareholders.
